name: WF07 — Content Builder (draft from brief + hooks)

meta.notes: SETUP: Set n8n variables SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON, SOCIAL_MEDIA_APP_URL, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY. This workflow: (1) fetches latest ready brief from WF06, (2) fetches brand voice rules, (3) fetches competitor video concepts as style references, (4) builds a draft prompt combining brief + voice rules + competitor style examples, (5) calls Claude to generate the full draft, (6) QA scores the draft against voice rules, (7) saves to content_drafts, (8) marks brief as used. Requires WF06 to have run first.
